senses.gloss: to cause to mourn or lament
to grieve, to mourn, to lament
to be or become sorrowful, sad, or unhappy

examples.english: Do not grieve; indeed God is with us.

senses.gloss: to be or become rugged and hard

examples.text: رَأَيْتُ الدَّهْرَ مُخْتَلِفًا يَدُورُ -- فَلَا حُزْنٌ يَدُومُ وَلَا سُرُورُ

Hadith
اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ ٱلْحَزْنَ إِنْ شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
al-lahumma lā sahla ʔillā mā jaʕaltahu sahlan waʔanta tajʕalu l-ḥazna ʔin šiʔta sahlan
examples.english: (please add an English translation of this quotation)
